case_title: MOUCHIR NAGUIB MOHAMED VS. ANDERSON ENTERPRISES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MITCHELL KUDLER--DIRECTOR OF OPERATIONS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
